title: In vitro human Th17 development
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"jfmfy","text":"This protocol describes the isolation of naive human T cells and culture conditions that result in the development of IL-17 producing helper Th17 cells.  The addition of IL-23 or IL-1 is essential for this process as is T cell receptor activation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"o355h","text":"Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ghw0t","text":"-Recombinant hIL-1β (50 ng/ml), rhIL-4 (10 ng/ml), rhIL-12 (5 ng/ml), rhIL-6 (30 ng/ml), rhTGFβ (10 ng/ml), and rhIL-2 (100 U/ml) were purchased from R\u0026D Systems. Recombinant hIL-23 was generated in house.\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"prp77","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"0ej6j","text":"-Medium : Yssel’s medium with 1% human serum AB was from Gemini Bio-Products\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"scahd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"o1vfx","text":"-Human CD4+ T cell isolation kit II (#130-091-155), human CD45RO microbeads (#130-046-001), and human T cell activation/expansion kit (#130-091-441) were from Miltenyi Biotec.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ooxr7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"x0jxh","text":"Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jeccn","text":"AutoMACS, Milteniy Biotec","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Human PBMC were isolated from buffy coats of healthy donors by Ficoll hypaque density centrifugation.

Total CD4+ T cells were isolated using the CD4+ T cell Isolation Kit II from Miltenyi Biotec: - Total PBMC were resuspended in 40μl of MACS buffer (PBS 0.5% BSA 2mM EDTA) per 10 7 cells, and incubated with 10 μl of Biotin-Antibody cocktail per 10 7 cells for 10 min at 4°C.
Subsequently, 30 μl of MACS buffer per 10 7 cells was added, and cells were incubated with 20 μl of Anti-Biotin Microbeads per 10 7 cells for 15 min at 4°C.
Cells were washed with MACS buffer and resuspended up to 10 8 cells in 500μl of MACS buffer.
CD4+ T cells were sorted by two rounds of magnetic depletion on the AutoMACS (program Deplete S).

CD4+ T cells (negative fraction) were washed with MACS buffer and resuspended in 80μl of MACS buffer per 10 7 cells. Then, 20μl of CD45RO microbeads per 10 7 cells was added for 15 min at 4°C. Naïve CD45RO- T cells were isolated by two rounds of depletion on the AutoMACS (as in step 2.).

Naïve CD4+ CD45RO- T cells were cultured at 1 × 10 6 cells/well in 96-well flat-bottom plates or 5 × 10 6 cells/well in 24-well plates (Falcon) for 5-6 days in Yssel’s medium containing 1% human AB serum (Gemini Bio Products) with the appropriate cytokines and beads coated with anti-CD3, anti-CD28, and anti-CD2 antibodies (T Cell Activation/Expansion Kit, Miltenyi Biotec) (1 bead/10 5 cells).

After 5-6 days, cells were collected, counted, washed and cultured at 1 × 10 6 cells/well in 96-well flat-bottom plates or 5 × 10 6 cells/well in 24-well plates for an additional period of 5-6 days in the presence of the indicated cytokines and IL-2.

After 10-12 days of culture, cells were counted and stimulated at 5 × 10 5 cells/ml with anti-CD3, anti-CD28, and anti-CD2 antibodies in the presence of IL-2 for 24 h to analyze gene expression or 48 h to assess cytokine level in cell-free supernatants.

Development, cytokine profile and function of human interleukin 17–producing helper T cells by NJ Wilson, K Boniface, JR Chan, BS McKenzie, WM Blumenschein, JD Mattson, B Basham, K Smith, T Chen, F Morel, J-C Lecron, RA Kastelein, DJ Cua, TK McClanahan, EP Bowman & R de Waal Malefyt published in Nature Immunology on 03 Jul, 2007 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/ni1497
creator: Protocols Importer
